leadText: The Abyssal Ruins (Japanese: 海底遺跡(かいていいせき) Undersea Ruins) are sunken temple ruins in eastern Unova, accessed through the use of Dive outside of battle. It is east of Undella Town in Undella Bay. The ruins are divided into four floors, each smaller than the last. There are no wild Pokémon or Trainers. In Black 2 and White 2, the Abyssal Ruins are not marked on the Town Map until the player has visited them.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] History [ edit | edit source ] Background [ edit | edit source ] About 3,000 years prior to the games, the Abyssal Ruins were built as part of an ancient city built by one of the ancient kings of Unova and his respective legendary dragon . At some point, the city was sunk to the bottom of the Undella Bay by a tsunami, however, the king managed to save all from the waves. After the king's death, the city became his resting place.
